---
title: "Sarah Paine Cleveland"
---

## Sarah Paine Cleveland

**Dates:** (d.1893)

**Maiden name:** (Perkins)

### Description

mother of Eliza Callahan Cleveland

### Biography

Mother and daughter were friends of Elizabeth Sewell\'s; see her autobiography (1907), 159, 208. See also <i>A Selection from the Writings of Henry R. Cleveland, with a Memoir</i> (Boston: private distribution 1844).  She married Henry Russell Cleveland (1808-1843) in 1838 and they had one daughter (b. 1839).  She was the sister of the art collector Edward Newton Perkins (1820-1899) and she and her daughter were with him in Perugia in 1859 when they were attacked by local revolutionaries, causing a diplomatic incident.

A large collection of their papers is in the New York Public Library.

### Letters

- Letter from May 10th 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
